pins.title: Best Robot Vacuums for Smart Homes: A Practical Guide
pins.description: Compare the Roborock Q5+ and Roomba j7+ by navigation approach, app control, docking and setup, smart-home compatibility, and floor-care fit.
pins.altText: FlowHome editorial pin with an abstract robot vacuum path motif and the headline Best Robot Vacuums for Smart Homes: A Practical Guide.

overlay.headline: Best robot vacuums for smart homes
overlay.subhead: Compare navigation, app control, docking, smart-home fit, and floor-care needs.

pins.title: Roborock Q5+ Review: LiDAR, App Control & Auto-Emptying
pins.description: A cautious review of the original Roborock Q5+ covering PreciSense LiDAR navigation, app control, Auto Dust Emptying, smart-home compatibility, and vacuum-only floor-care fit.
pins.altText: FlowHome review pin for the original Roborock Q5+ with a circular navigation motif and text about LiDAR, app control, and auto-emptying.

overlay.headline: Roborock Q5+
overlay.subhead: PreciSense LiDAR, app control, and Auto Dust Emptying in a vacuum-only system.

pins.title: iRobot Roomba j7+ Review: Smart Mapping & Obstacle Avoidance
pins.description: Review the iRobot Roomba j7+ through PrecisionVision Navigation, Imprint Smart Mapping, app and voice controls, obstacle avoidance, and vacuum-only floor-care fit.
pins.altText: FlowHome review pin for iRobot Roomba j7+ with a mapped-room grid motif and text about smart mapping and tradeoffs.

overlay.headline: Roomba j7+
overlay.subhead: PrecisionVision obstacle avoidance, Imprint Smart Mapping, and connected controls.

pins.title: Smart Home Hubs: Matter & Zigbee Buying Guide

pins.title: Aqara Hub M2 Review: Zigbee Focus & Ecosystem Fit

pins.title: SwitchBot Hub 2 Review: Matter Ready, No Zigbee

overlay.headline: SwitchBot Hub 2
